title: wedelia pilosa var. genuina
intro: Wedelia pilosa var. genuina, also known as the Yellow Daisy or False Daisy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Wedelia pilosa var. genuina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin problems such as wounds and eczema. Herbal preparations of Wedelia pilosa var. genuina can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
